He wears a zip front jacket with burgundy panels on the shoulders and upper sleeves, broad light gray horizontal stripes across the chest and sleeves, dark cuffs and hem, a light collared shirt at the neckline, straight-leg pants with loose lower hems, dark shoes, and a dark blue backpack with blue toned panels and two shoulder straps.
